text: Stepping into this space, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and potential. The room feels orderly yet vibrant, as its glass walls both separate me from and invite me into the world beyond—a world branded with research and development. There is a gentle hum of possibility here, as though every surface and screen might spark an idea or reveal an insight. I feel a quiet anticipation, eager to explore what knowledge and creativity dwell within these walls.
